Source: AgentCore Doc History
URL: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock-agentcore/latest/devguide/doc-history.html
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Document History for the AgentCore User Guide - Amazon Bedrock AgentCore

## Overview
This page tracks documentation releases for Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, listing changes and their descriptions with dates.

## Documentation Changes

### December 2, 2025
- **Policy in Amazon Bedrock AgentCore** - Added documentation for policy-based governance and control for agent interactions, including policy evaluation, monitoring, and enforcement capabilities
- **Episodic memory strategy** - Added documentation for using the episodic memory strategy in AgentCore Memory
- **Custom claims value support for AgentCore Gateway authentication** - Added documentation for specifying custom claims values in Gateway authentication
- **Bidirectional streaming** - Added documentation for real-time, full-duplex communication between clients and agents using WebSocket protocol with AgentCore Runtime
- **Authentication token support for AgentCore Gateway** - Added documentation for setting up OAuth authorization tokens for gateways
- **Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Evaluations** - Added comprehensive suite of capabilities for measuring and monitoring agent and tool performance, accuracy, and reliability in development and production
- **API gateways as gateway targets** - Added documentation for Amazon API Gateway REST API stages as targets

### November 4, 2025
- **Direct code deployment** - Added documentation enabling deployment of Python agents to Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime using ZIP file archives

### October 31, 2025
- **Get started updates** - Updated prerequisites, files, and commands in the Get started with AgentCore topic

### October 30, 2025
- **Web Bot Auth (Preview)** - Added documentation for Browser Web Bot Auth feature enabling cryptographic signing of HTTP requests to reduce CAPTCHA challenges

### October 13, 2025
- **Runtime identity service-linked role** - Added documentation for managing workload identity access tokens and OAuth credentials; updated BedrockAgentCoreFullAccess policy
- **General release** - Amazon Bedrock AgentCore is now generally available

### October 10, 2025
- **Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers as Gateway targets** - Added documentation including synchronization operations

### October 2, 2025
- **Model Context Protocol (MCP) server support** - Added documentation for MCP server supporting transformation, deployment, and testing of AgentCore-compatible agents with Kiro, Cursor, Claude Code, and Amazon Q CLI

### September 19, 2025
- **Managed policy updates** - Updated managed policy documentation; added BedrockAgentCoreNetworkServiceRolePolicy; updated BedrockAgentCoreFullAccess policy

### July 16, 2025
- **Initial release (preview)** - Initial release of the Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Developer Guide
